tagline_en: I design Data+AI products and deliver digital transformation solutions
tagline_zh: 我喜欢设计Data+AI产品，交付数智化转型解决方案

bio.text_en: Data and AI professional with 3 years of B2B pre-sales consulting and 5 years of manufacturing R&D experience, focusing on data intelligence and industrial AI applications.
bio.text_zh: 3年B2B售前顾问与5年制造业产品研发复合背景，聚焦数据智能与工业智能体应用，擅长在技术能力与真实场景之间界定产品边界，并将需求转化为可交付的产品方案与工程化路径。

bio.text_en: At SAS, as JMP data analysis consultant for North China, delivered Data+AI solutions for semiconductor and automotive industries, enabled digital transformation and secured million-RMB-level orders. At StarNeto, led cross-functional collaboration to optimize core metrics to domestic leading level.
bio.text_zh: 在SAS担任JMP软件华北区数据分析顾问期间，主导售前方案设计与产品演示，赋能半导体、汽车等制造企业数字化转型；在星网宇达任部门经理期间，主导跨部门协作将核心指标提升至国内领先水平，显著加速产品研发与量产。

bio.text_en: Beihang University M.Eng. PMP and Alibaba Cloud ACP LLM certified.
bio.text_zh: 北航工学硕士，持有PMP与阿里云大模型ACP认证。

badges.text_zh: 阿里云大模型高级工程师ACP
大模型应用开发工程师
